channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large pothole, 31st March
item.description:
2 large potholes in the road. Very dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain cover wedged between my tyre and car frame, 31st March
item.description:
Drain cover loose. Opposite no 5 church row Gretton

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alderton Road, Gretton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of 2 large plastic containers with fluid, 31st March
item.description:
Someone has dumped 2 large plastic bottle containers containing unknown fluid near our back entrance.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Hales Road, Battledown, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive potholes on the left side of the road, 31st March
item.description:
Massive potholes on the left side of the road when coming down into Sevenhampton

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenhampton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole heading to London Road Opposite 2 Acomb Close on Hartlebury Way., 31st March
item.description:
Pothole heading to London Road Opposite 2 Acomb Close on Hartlebury Way. My Bike bike front wheel went straight into the pothole, generating a significant discomfort for me.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glenfall Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole in middle of zebra crossing, 31st March
item.description:
While negotiating the zebra crossing in Rodney Road my ankle caught in a pothole causing me to fall. This was exacerbated by the fact that I have recently had both knees surgically replaced. PLEASE REPAIR IMMEDIATELY. Someone could be seriously injured at this supposedly safe road crossing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 73, Rodney Road, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flight tipped to sofa blocking the alleyway, 31st March
item.description:
Fly so far is preventing disabled access for wheelchairs, mobility scooters and push chairs down the alley way between Orchard Avenue and Brooklyn Road. I know that this is a GCC highway. Can someone clear it up please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 104;106, Orchard Avenue, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on near entrance to College Drive, 31st March
item.description:
Pothole on Arle Road near entrance to College Drive. Been present for several months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 112, Arle Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 1m by 5” cm pothole next to field where there is building works. In part of road wheel of car runs, 31st March
item.description:
See above
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hunters Hill Lane, Cowley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole in road, 31st March
item.description:
Large pothole outside number 11 longlands close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26,28, Longlands Close, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole, 31st March
item.description:
Large pothole at the junction of Hayden Lane at the very entrance
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Surface is damaged problem, 31st March
item.description:
PROW pavement is uneven, breaking up in places, holes where water has been
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged grate, 31st March
item.description:
Hole appearing at the end of Larput Place

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Victoria Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gloucestershire way blocked after plowing, 31st March
item.description:
Gloucestershire way blocked at marked location

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ashchurch Rural, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 31st March
item.description:
Customer reports that two trees (one a Willow) appear to be shedding large branches at the location; one significant branch, which is hanging, is currently very unstable and is likely to fall at any time. They feel that both pedestrians and property are at risk.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 31st March
item.description:
CW: Edge deteration 2400mmx500mmx105mm TM: STOP and GO ENWD Opposite The Old Spot Car Park (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 31st March
item.description:
Large pothole, partially repaired but still a hazard
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Montpellier Terrace, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verges need cutting, 31st March
item.description:
Alongside no.1 Tern Court/Rookery Rd corner near Tech Park. This part of the road seems to get missed on the grass cut, whilst it was always been done in the previous 20 years or so. Opposite 1 Tern Court around the tree and a very small patch always gets trimmed. Why is this being missed ?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rookery Road, Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green or amber traffic light is not working problem, 31st March
item.description:
Police reporting the traffic signals are all out at this junction. People are speeding through...
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 31st March
item.description:
CW: Pothole 1460mmx550mmx76mm TM: STOP and GO ENWD Opposite Troughton Farms (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet
